content.text: Good. Now I'll create all the files. Let me do it in parallel batches.

input.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<databaseChangeLog
        xmlns="http://www.liquibase.org/xml/ns/dbchangelog"
        xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
        xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.liquibase.org/xml/ns/dbchangelog http://www.liquibase.org/xml/ns/dbchangelog/dbchangelog-latest.xsd">

    <changeSet id="006-1" author="luobeilin">
        <sql>
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `collabspace_space_announcement` (
                `id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '主键',
                `space_id` VARCHAR(50) NULL COMMENT '空间站ID，空间站公告必填，平台公告为NULL',
                `category` TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '公告分类：1=空间站公告，2=平台公告',
                `title` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL COMMENT '公告标题',
                `content` TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT '公告正文（富文本HTML）',
                `status` TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '状态：0=待发布，1=已发布，2=已下线',
                `publish_type` TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '发布方式：0=立即发布，1=定时发布',
                `is_popup` TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '是否弹窗提示',
                `scheduled_publish_time` DATETIME NULL COMMENT '定时发布时间',
                `publish_time` DATETIME NULL COMMENT '实际生效时间',
                `expire_time` DATETIME NULL COMMENT '有效期截止时间，NULL=永久有效',
                `offline_time` DATETIME NULL COMMENT '下线时间',
                `publisher_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '发布人用户ID',
                `publisher_name` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '发布人姓名',
                `is_deleted` TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '软删除标记',
                `created_by` BIGINT NULL COMMENT '创建人',
                `updated_by` BIGINT NULL COMMENT '更新人',
                `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间',
                `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间',
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                INDEX `idx_space_category_status` (`space_id`, `category`, `status`),
                INDEX `idx_status_expire` (`status`, `expire_time`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='空间站公告';

            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `collabspace_space_announcement_read_record` (
                `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '主键',
                `announcement_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '公告ID',
                `user_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '用户ID',
                `space_id` VARCHAR(50) NULL COMMENT '空间站ID',
                `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '已读时间',
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                UNIQUE INDEX `uk_announcement_user` (`announcement_id`, `user_id`),
                INDEX `idx_user_id` (`user_id`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='空间站公告已读记录';
        </sql>
    </changeSet>

</databaseChangeLog>

content.content: The file /d/project/pt-gitlab/collabspace/collabspace-server/src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.changelog-master.xml has been updated successfully.

content.text:
All 15 files have been created successfully. Here is a summary of everything done:

---

**Task 1 — Liquibase Changelog**

- Created: `src/main/resources/db/changelog/006_space_announcement.xml` — defines `collabspace_space_announcement` and `collabspace_space_announcement_read_record` tables with all indexes.
- Modified: `db.changelog-master.xml` — added the `<include>` entry for `006_space_announcement.xml` after the existing 005 entry.

**Task 2 — Enums (3 files)**

- `spaceannouncement/enums/AnnouncementCategory.java` — SPACE(1) / PLATFORM(2), with `fromCode()` helper.
- `spaceannouncement/enums/SpaceAnnouncementStatus.java` — PENDING(0) / ACTIVE(1) / OFFLINE(2).
- `spaceannouncement/enums/PublishType.java` — IMMEDIATE(0) / SCHEDULED(1).

**Task 3 — Entities (2 files)**

- `spaceannouncement/entity/SpaceAnnouncementEntity.java` — extends `BaseEntity`, `@SuperBuilder`, `@TableName(keepGlobalPrefix = true, value = "space_announcement")`.
- `spaceannouncement/entity/SpaceAnnouncementReadRecordEntity.java` — standalone (no BaseEntity), `@TableId(type = IdType.AUTO)`.

**Task 4 — Mappers (2 files)**

- `spaceannouncement/mapper/SpaceAnnouncementMapper.java` — extends `BaseMapper<SpaceAnnouncementEntity>`.
- `spaceannouncement/mapper/SpaceAnnouncementReadRecordMapper.java` — extends `BaseMapper<SpaceAnnouncementReadRecordEntity>`.
- Both are under `com.yottastudios.ns.collabspace.spaceannouncement.mapper`, which is covered by the existing `MapperScan` pattern.

**Task 5 — RO classes (2 files)**

- `spaceannouncement/ro/CreateSpaceAnnouncementRo.java` — full `@NotNull`/`@NotBlank`/`@Size` validation, Swagger `@Schema` annotations.
- `spaceannouncement/ro/UpdateSpaceAnnouncementRo.java` — same validation conventions.

**Task 6 — VO classes (3 files)**

- `spaceannouncement/vo/SpaceAnnouncementVo.java` — full detail VO with `@JsonFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm")` on all `LocalDateTime` fields.
- `spaceannouncement/vo/ActiveAnnouncementVo.java` — lightweight list VO (id, category, title).
- `spaceannouncement/vo/UnreadPopupAnnouncementVo.java` — popup VO with content included.

---

**本次改动中文总结：**

新建了 `spaceannouncement` 模块的基础骨架，共 15 个文件：
- Liquibase 006 changelog（2张表 + 索引）并注册到 master 文件
- 3个枚举（公告分类、状态、发布方式）
- 2个实体（主表继承 BaseEntity，已读记录表独立）
- 2个 Mapper 接口（继承 BaseMapper，走现有 MapperScan 自动扫描）
- 2个 RO（创建/编辑入参，含 JSR-303 校验注解）
- 3个 VO（详情、列表轻量、未读弹窗）
